name: ui-ux-pro-max
desc: Comprehensive UI/UX design intelligence with searchable database of 67 styles, 96 color palettes, 57 font pairings, and 99 UX guidelines.

name: customize-opencode
desc: Edit or create opencode's own configuration files including opencode.json, .opencode/ files, agents, subagents, skills, plugins, MCP servers, and permission rules.

name: skill-installer
desc: Install curated and external skills from GitHub repositories. Automatically discovers and places SKILL.md files in the correct directory.

name: skill-creator
desc: Guide agents through building well-structured SKILL.md files with proper YAML frontmatter, descriptions, and usage instructions.

name: git-release
desc: Create consistent releases and changelogs. Draft release notes from merged PRs, propose version bumps, and provide copy-pasteable gh release create commands.

name: pr-review
desc: Automated pull request review workflow. Analyzes diff quality, tests, coverage, and provides structured feedback with change requests.

name: webapp-testing
desc: Test local web apps with Playwright. Uses Python Playwright scripts with server lifecycle helper. Inspects rendered pages before acting with discovered selectors.

name: deep-research
desc: Structured deep research skill with human-in-the-loop control. Multi-step investigation with source tracking, summarization, and citation management.

name: test
desc: Run tests and analyze results across multiple frameworks. Automatic test file discovery, execution, and failure diagnosis with fix suggestions.

name: docs
desc: Write and maintain documentation. Generates README files, API docs, inline comments, and architecture decision records from code analysis.

name: debug
desc: Systematic debugging workflow. Reproduces issues, instruments code, analyzes logs, and iterates toward root cause identification with suggested fixes.

name: refactor
desc: Code refactoring patterns and migrations. Identifies code smells, plans incremental refactors, and executes safe transformations with test validation.

name: security-audit
desc: Security review and vulnerability detection. Scans dependencies, code patterns, and configuration for OWASP Top 10 and CVE exposure.

name: api-design
desc: REST and GraphQL API design patterns. Suggests endpoint structures, request/response schemas, error handling, versioning, and OpenAPI specification generation.

name: database
desc: Database schema design and migrations. Analyzes data models, suggests indexes, generates migration files, and optimizes query patterns.

name: docker
desc: Docker and container management. Creates optimized Dockerfiles, docker-compose setups, multi-stage builds, and containerization strategies.

name: ci-cd
desc: CI/CD pipeline setup and maintenance. Configures GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or other runners with caching, parallel jobs, and deployment stages.

name: accessibility
desc: Accessibility auditing and remediation. Scans for WCAG violations, suggests ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation fixes, and screen reader improvements.

name: performance
desc: Performance optimization analysis. Identifies bottlenecks in code, bundles, rendering, and queries with measurable improvement suggestions.

name: architecture
desc: System architecture design and review. Evaluates trade-offs, proposes module boundaries, suggests patterns, and produces ADRs for decision tracking.

name: commit
desc: Contextual commit messages with structured formatting. Analyzes staged changes and produces conventional commit messages with scope and body.

name: deploy
desc: Deployment automation across environments. Manages build, staging, health checks, rollbacks, and environment-specific configuration injection.

name: monitoring
desc: Application monitoring and observability setup. Configures logging, metrics, tracing, dashboards, and alert rules for production systems.

name: memory
desc: AI memory management across sessions. Stores and retrieves context using vector databases, enabling persistent cross-session knowledge for agents.
